items.title: Russian senator calls for recruiting women and disabled people into drone defence units
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Police station opens at Hitler's birthplace in bid to rid site of Nazi link
items.dek: The opening follows years of controversy about what to do with the 17th-Century former inn, where the Nazi dictator was born.
items.body: The opening follows years of controversy about what to do with the 17th-Century former inn, where the Nazi dictator was born.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ukrainian drones hit more sites of Russian online retailer Wildberries
items.dek: Logistics hubs belonging to Wildberries in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were struck overnight.
items.body: Logistics hubs belonging to Wildberries in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were struck overnight.
